data.description:
## Purpose
This ticket was created to verify the bidirectional Jira<->tickets sync is working after the TZ fix (275d-dfd5) and assignee error fix (0cd6-57d6).

## Expected Behavior
- This ticket should appear in Jira as a new DIG issue
- All fields (title, description, status, priority) should sync correctly
- Status changes should propagate back from Jira to this ticket
data.title: [verification]: Bidirectional sync E2E test ticket
